topic: My daughter's kindergarten drawings all show a tall man in a hallway we have never lived in
title: My Daughter's Kindergarten Drawings All Show a Tall Man in a Hallway. We Have Never Lived in That House. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My daughter drew the same hallway in kindergarten every day. With a tall man standing in it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child's crayon drawing on cream construction paper showing a long narrow hallway with a tall stick figure standing at the end, the figure colored entirely in dark crayon, dim warm lamp light on the drawing, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She was five. We lived in a one bedroom apartment in Tacoma.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a modest two story apartment building in a quiet residential street at dusk, a single warm window on the second floor glowing, no people on the sidewalk, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Her teacher mentioned it at parent night. Forty seven drawings. Same scene.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a school classroom bulletin board covered with children's crayon drawings pinned in rows, several visible drawings showing the same dark hallway scene, dim afternoon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wood floors. Yellow wallpaper. A tall man in a long coat at the far end.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of one of the child's drawings on construction paper, the hallway shown in colored crayon with brown floor, yellow walls, and a dark tall figure with a long coat at the far end, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked her where the house was. She said our other house.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a kitchen at evening, two crayons and a piece of construction paper on the table beside a juice box, no people, soft pendant light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We have only ever had this apartment. No previous address.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a stack of paper rental documents on a kitchen table, the top document showing an apartment lease with a single address listed, dim ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last winter my mother sent us a box of old photographs.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small cardboard box on a wooden floor with a torn brown paper wrapping pulled back, a stack of color photographs visible inside, dim ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pictures of the house she rented in nineteen ninety four. Before I was born.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single faded color photograph from the early nineties showing a small wooden frame house with a porch, the photo edges showing age, dim warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wood floors. Yellow wallpaper. The same hallway my daughter drew.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old color photograph held in two hands showing the interior of a residential hallway with wood floors and yellow patterned wallpaper, a closed door at the far end, dim warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I showed her the photo. She pointed at the hallway and smiled.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small child's hand pointing at a faded color photograph resting on a kitchen table, the photo showing the same yellow hallway, dim ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She said that is where he waits for me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child's crayon drawing on the refrigerator held by a magnet, showing the same hallway scene with the tall dark figure, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called my mother. The house burned down in nineteen ninety seven. One person died in the hallway.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a digitized scan of an old newspaper article with a house fire headline, the date in the corner showing nineteen ninety seven, dim ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing
